nasb.text: On that day the Lord exalted Joshua in the sight of all Israel; so that they revered him, just as they had revered Moses all the days of his life.

esv.text: On that day the Lord  exalted Joshua in the sight of all Israel, and they stood in awe of him just as they had stood in awe of Moses, all the days of his life.

cnv.text: 那一天耶和華使約書亞在以色列眾人眼中成為尊大；在他一生的日子，人民敬畏他，好像敬畏摩西一樣。

ccb.text: 那一天，耶和华使约书亚在以色列众人面前受尊重，他像摩西一样终生受民众敬畏。
